description:
What: When result Descr classifies to List, caller pre-allocates the cons chain in one bumped span (length-known) or falls back to non-DPS (length-unknown).

BLOCKED BY fz-6rw: cell layout coordinates with the 16-byte cons target. If RC for cons proves infeasible at 16B, list FBIP defers and only contiguous-construction lands here.

CLIF impact: strict reduction for length-known list construction.

Removes: per-cell alloc dispatch when contiguous.

Tests: golden CLIF on [a, b, c] construction.
title: fz-dps.F4: DPS for MakeList (cons construction)
